vocab.meaning: sự tự chủ về trí tuệ/tư duy
vocab.example: What I prize most is the intellectual autonomy my course grants us to pursue independent research projects.

vocab.meaning: mối quan hệ cộng sinh/hỗ trợ lẫn nhau
vocab.example: There is a symbiotic relationship between the theory we learn in lectures and the practical workshops we attend.

vocab.meaning: những hiểu biết sâu sắc và súc tích
vocab.example: Our seminars are often filled with pithy insights that challenge my preconceived notions about global economics.

vocab.meaning: sự mâu thuẫn trong nhận thức
vocab.example: I find the moments of cognitive dissonance the most interesting, as they force me to re-evaluate my existing knowledge.
The interdisciplinary synergy between computer science and linguistics in my major is absolutely fascinating.

vocab.meaning: phương pháp học tập tự khám phá
vocab.example: The curriculum emphasizes heuristic learning, encouraging us to find solutions through trial and error rather than rote memorization.

vocab.meaning: những tác động/hệ quả sâu sắc
vocab.example: Studying ethics allows me to see the profound implications that emerging technologies have on modern society.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nghiêm ngặt trong học thuật
vocab.example: I thrive on the academic rigor of my program, as it constantly pushes the boundaries of my mental capabilities.

vocab.meaning: phân tích những hiện tượng phức tạp
vocab.example: It is deeply satisfying to learn how to dissect complex phenomena into manageable, understandable components.

vocab.meaning: một trải nghiệm mang tính thay đổi bản thân
vocab.example: Overall, delving into the history of art has been a transformative experience that changed how I view the world.
